with your content.

Main features

Here's a glimpse at the main features our script offers

Mobile Ready

Cross compatible & mobile-first design.

Advanced Admin panel

Easy to use, fully featured admin panel.

User subscriptions

Easy to use and reliable subscription system.

User feed & Locked posts

Advanced feed system, pay to unlock posts.

Light & Dark themes

Eazy to customize themes, dark & light mode.

RTL & Locales

Fully localize your site with languages & RTL.

Live chat & Notifications

Live user messenger & User notifications.

Post Bookmarks & User lists

Stay updated with list users and bookmarks.

Content flagging and User reports

Stay safe with user and content reporting.

Technologies used

Built on secure, scalable and reliable techs
